Aug 12, 2010 cURL is a software project providing a library and command-line tool for transferring data using various protocols. The cURL project produces two products, libcurl and cURL. It was first

uces two products, libcurl and cURL. It was first released in 1997. Curl is installed in /usr/sww/bin/curl on the EECS Solaris SPARC computers. For a list of the computers, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst/iesglabs.html
